executives.name: David Zinsner
executives.background: David A. Zinsner has been Intel’s Executive Vice President and CFO since January 2022. Before joining Intel, he was Executive Vice President and CFO at Micron Technology, Inc. from 2018 to 2022. He also served as President and COO of Affirmed Networks and held CFO roles at Analog Devices and Intersil Corp.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Edward Frank
executives.background: Co-founder of Cloud Parity. Former Vice President of Macintosh Hardware Systems Engineering at Apple.

executives.name: Lisa Su
executives.background: Dr. Su is AMD’s Chair, President and Chief Executive Officer. She has been AMD’s President and Chief Executive Officer since October 2014 and Chair of the Board since May 2022. Previously, she served as Senior Vice President and General Manager, Global Business Units from 2012 to 2014. Prior to joining AMD, Dr. Su served as Senior Vice President and General Manager, Networking and Multimedia at Freescale Semiconductor, Inc. and spent 13 years at IBM in various engineering and business leadership positions.

executives.name: Richard Beyer
executives.background: Mr. Beyer was the Chairman and CEO of Freescale Semiconductor, Inc. and has held executive roles at Intersil Corporation and Elantec Semiconductor.
